name: Neckbeards
startIntroPart1: M'lady, prepare to be enlightened by superior intellect.
startIntroPart2: A civilization of enlightened gentlemen of culture, pedantry, and dubious hygiene. Tips fedora aggressively.
declaringWar: You've clearly never studied the blade. En garde!
attacked: A logical fallacy! I shall debunk your aggression!
defeated: Reeeee! The normies have won... but my intellect remains unmatched.
introduction: Ah, a fellow purveyor of fine culture. I see you're not yet aware of my superior taste.
hateHello: Oh, it's you. Didn't we already establish my intellectual dominance?
tradeRequest: I offer a trade of rare pepes and intellectual property.
denounced: Your tastes are plebeian and your arguments unsound!
declaringfriendship: Let us form a gentleman's alliance. I shall share my finest memes with you.

name: Incels
startIntroPart1: It's over, they have high appeal and I have low SMV.
startIntroPart2: A bitter, envious tribe that blames the world for its romantic struggles. Their cope is legendary.
declaringWar: All Chads must be eliminated! Prepare for the blackpilled offensive!
attacked: Typical foid aggression. We will hold the line with cope and rope.
defeated: We will go ER on you! This is just the beginning of the incel uprising.
introduction: Hey. You're probably thinking I'm some kind of subhuman. You're right.
neutralHello: Do you know about looks theory?
hateHello: You're just another Chad/Stacy, aren't you?
tradeRequest: I have some high-quality copium to trade for goods.
denounced: You are genetically inferior and your face is asymmetrical!
declaringfriendship: Fine, you're not a Chad. We can be... acquaintances.

name: Soyboys
startIntroPart1: Open wide, here comes the soy!
startIntroPart2: A peaceful, overly agreeable people who love plants, soft living, and avoiding conflict. Their jawlines are weak but their hearts are full.
declaringWar: This is for all the soy that was wrongfully mocked!
attacked: O-oh no... please don't hurt our tofu gardens...
defeated: It's okay! We're still friends, right? Peace and love!
introduction: H-hi! Would you like to try my homemade plant milk?
neutralHello: Howdy! Peace and tofu to you!
hateHello: I'm not mad, I'm just disappointed in your aggressive masculinity.
tradeRequest: I'll trade you some artisanal soy candles for your surplus.
denounced: Your testosterone levels are really problematic, you know.
declaringfriendship: Let's be besties! I'll bring the avocado toast!
uniques: [-15% Strength] for [All] units <with [50]% chance to ignore this>

name: Chuds
startIntroPart2: A race of loud, hyper-masculine bruisers who love lifting, grilling, and asserting dominance. The polar opposite of soy.
declaringWar: CHUD SMASH! Your puny cities will fall!
attacked: Ahahaha! Finally, a real fight! Bring it, you soyboys!
defeated: Grrr... cheater... I'll be back after leg day...
introduction: Hey bro, you even lift? Welcome to the iron temple!
hateHello: You smell of soy. Step aside, weakling.
tradeRequest: Trade me for this premium whey and ribeye.
denounced: You are a beta cuck and your civilization is pathetic!
declaringfriendship: Alright, you're a solid bro. Let's lift together!
